description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic and skeletal design, with a prominent exposed frame and minimal body panels. The wheels are large, disc-like, and have a unique spoked pattern, while the tires appear thin and integrated into the wheel structure. The front of the motorcycle is equipped with angular, translucent fairings and side mirrors that extend outward, giving it a streamlined appearance. The seat is elongated and tapers toward the rear, with a visible subframe and a series of raised elements along the tail section. The handlebars are wide and slightly raised, with controls and mirrors attached. The color scheme includes dark blue, black, white, and hints of translucent yellow and purple, contributing to its high-tech, concept-bike aesthetic.
description: A futuristic motorcycle with a skeletal frame, large spoked wheels, and angular translucent fairings in blue, black, white, and yellow hues.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile, dual side mirrors, and angular translucent fairing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed frame, large spoked wheels, and elongated seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slim tail section, rear wheel, and symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the unique wheel design, frame structure, and handlebar placement.
